name: TANVI TANVI
pitch: Ferrofluid Topography. Cursor velocity sculpts a real GPU height field on the image surface — fast strokes carve channels, a resting cursor swells a dome — and reconstructed normals catch directional light along the ridgelines.

lifecycle.idle: Liquid-metal surface breathing with a faint sine undulation, terrain settled flat
lifecycle.discovery: Cursor enters, a soft mass begins swelling the local surface into a dome
lifecycle.buildUp: Dragging carves signed channels and ridges, normals sharpening under the light
lifecycle.peak: Rapid motion sculpts turbulent topography, specular glints riding the ridgelines
lifecycle.recovery: Spring damping pulls the terrain back past flat with a slight overshoot before resting
